data.name: Capture it. Keep it in sight.
data.value: Capture it. Keep it in sight.

data.name: A local-first screenshot and floating-reference tool for Windows.
data.value: A local-first screenshot and floating-reference tool for Windows.

data.name: Drag any region across one or more displays. Copy, save, or pin the result.
data.value: Drag any region across one or more displays. Copy, save, or pin the result.

data.name: Keep images, image files, text, or hex colors in borderless topmost windows.
data.value: Keep images, image files, text, or hex colors in borderless topmost windows.

data.name: Drag to move, scroll to resize, Ctrl+scroll for opacity, and right-click for tools.
data.value: Drag to move, scroll to resize, Ctrl+scroll for opacity, and right-click for tools.

data.name: Choose the key that starts region capture.
data.value: Choose the key that starts region capture.

data.name: Applies the next time SnapPin starts. Windows will show a UAC confirmation prompt.
data.value: Applies the next time SnapPin starts. Windows will show a UAC confirmation prompt.

data.name: Back up open pins and settings automatically
data.value: Back up open pins and settings automatically

data.name: Keep SnapPin running in the notification area when the dashboard closes
data.value: Keep SnapPin running in the notification area when the dashboard closes

data.name: Settings are stored locally under your Windows user profile. No account or cloud connection is used.
data.value: Settings are stored locally under your Windows user profile. No account or cloud connection is used.

data.name: Show full-screen cross lines at the cursor
data.value: Show full-screen cross lines at the cursor

data.name: Show coordinate and size badge above the selection
data.value: Show coordinate and size badge above the selection

data.name: Show automatic window and UI-element detection outline
data.value: Show automatic window and UI-element detection outline

data.name: Exclude SnapPin pins and controls from screenshots and recordings
data.value: Exclude SnapPin pins and controls from screenshots and recordings

data.name: W / A / S / D Move cursor precisely
data.value: W / A / S / D Move cursor precisely

data.name: Mouse wheel Parent / child UI element
data.value: Mouse wheel Parent / child UI element

data.name: Shift + C Recognize and copy text
data.value: Shift + C Recognize and copy text

data.name: Drawing tools shown directly in the first capture row.
data.value: Drawing tools shown directly in the first capture row.

data.name: Output actions shown after the drawing tools.
data.value: Output actions shown after the drawing tools.

data.name: MP4 uses Windows Media Foundation and stays entirely on this computer.
data.value: MP4 uses Windows Media Foundation and stays entirely on this computer.

data.name: Show a shadow around pinned windows
data.value: Show a shadow around pinned windows

data.name: Make new pinned images text-selectable by default (local OCR)
data.value: Make new pinned images text-selectable by default (local OCR)

data.name: Manage named groups from the Pins tab on the SnapPin dashboard
data.value: Manage named groups from the Pins tab on the SnapPin dashboard

data.name: Switch bound pin groups automatically with Windows virtual desktops
data.value: Switch bound pin groups automatically with Windows virtual desktops

data.name: Organize floating references into groups. A group can follow a Windows virtual desktop automatically.
data.value: Organize floating references into groups. A group can follow a Windows virtual desktop automatically.

data.name: Completed captures are stored locally. When the limit is reached, the oldest captures are removed automatically.
data.value: Completed captures are stored locally. When the limit is reached, the oldest captures are removed automatically.

data.name: Include a shadow when saving or copying as files
data.value: Include a shadow when saving or copying as files

data.name: Show a notification after quick save
data.value: Show a notification after quick save

data.name: The emergency Alt+Shift+P shortcut always remains available so click-through pins can be recovered.
data.value: The emergency Alt+Shift+P shortcut always remains available so click-through pins can be recovered.

data.name: Text and QR/barcode recognition runs on this computer. Images are not uploaded to a cloud service.
data.value: Text and QR/barcode recognition runs on this computer. Images are not uploaded to a cloud service.

data.name: Automatically recognizes positioned text when a new pin opens. Each pin can still override this from its right-click menu.
data.value: Automatically recognizes positioned text when a new pin opens. Each pin can still override this from its right-click menu.

data.name: Local-first capture and floating visual references
data.value: Local-first capture and floating visual references

data.name: This is an independent implementation built with documented Windows APIs. It contains no Snipaste code, branding, or assets.
data.value: This is an independent implementation built with documented Windows APIs. It contains no Snipaste code, branding, or assets.

data.name: Unexpected errors are logged locally. Logs are retained for 14 days and open pins use verified generation backups.
data.value: Unexpected errors are logged locally. Logs are retained for 14 days and open pins use verified generation backups.

data.name: Check for updates when SnapPin starts
data.value: Check for updates when SnapPin starts

data.name: Windows lets SnapPin hide its own windows from video capture. Other applications are securely covered in still screenshots; video exclusion also requires privacy support from that application.
data.value: Windows lets SnapPin hide its own windows from video capture. Other applications are securely covered in still screenshots; video exclusion also requires privacy support from that application.

data.name: Windows will display a User Account Control prompt when SnapPin starts
data.value: Windows will display a User Account Control prompt when SnapPin starts

data.name: Set optional dimensions, ratio, delay, and cursor capture.
data.value: Set optional dimensions, ratio, delay, and cursor capture.

data.name: Use 0 for a freely drawn width
data.value: Use 0 for a freely drawn width

data.name: Use 0 for a freely drawn height
data.value: Use 0 for a freely drawn height

data.name: Tip: leave width and height at 0 to constrain only the aspect ratio.
data.value: Tip: leave width and height at 0 to constrain only the aspect ratio.

data.name: Drag to choose the crop area
data.value: Drag to choose the crop area

data.name: Drag the smaller area to recognize
data.value: Drag the smaller area to recognize

data.name: Stop and review recording (R or Esc)
data.value: Stop and review recording (R or Esc)

data.name: Search title, tag, text, or barcode
data.value: Search title, tag, text, or barcode

data.name: Search OCR text, barcode content, source, dimensions, or date
data.value: Search OCR text, barcode content, source, dimensions, or date

data.name: One or more selected shortcuts are already used by Windows or another app
data.value: One or more selected shortcuts are already used by Windows or another app

data.name:
The interface language has changed. Restart SnapPin now to apply it throughout the app?
Choose No to apply it the next time SnapPin starts.
data.value:
The interface language has changed. Restart SnapPin now to apply it throughout the app?
Choose No to apply it the next time SnapPin starts.

data.name: SnapPin could not restart automatically. Please close and open it again.
data.value: SnapPin could not restart automatically. Please close and open it again.

data.name: Move this item to the recycle bin?
data.value: Move this item to the recycle bin?

data.name: Permanently delete this item and its files?
data.value: Permanently delete this item and its files?

data.name: Permanently delete every item in the recycle bin?
data.value: Permanently delete every item in the recycle bin?

data.name: Move every active item to the recycle bin?
data.value: Move every active item to the recycle bin?

data.name: No text or code was found.
data.value: No text or code was found.

data.name: The recognition area was too small. Select an area and try again.
data.value: The recognition area was too small. Select an area and try again.

data.name: SnapPin {0} is installed. The official GitHub update source is unavailable.
data.value: SnapPin {0} is installed. The official GitHub update source is unavailable.

data.name: The official update source is not a valid HTTPS address.
data.value: The official update source is not a valid HTTPS address.

data.name: The GitHub release did not contain a valid version.
data.value: The GitHub release did not contain a valid version.

data.name: See the GitHub release page for full release notes.
data.value: See the GitHub release page for full release notes.

data.name: The required update package is not attached to this GitHub release.
data.value: The required update package is not attached to this GitHub release.

data.name: Click an annotation to select it, then drag to move it.
data.value: Click an annotation to select it, then drag to move it.

data.name: Click to place text. Enter adds a line; Ctrl+Enter finishes.
data.value: Click to place text. Enter adds a line; Ctrl+Enter finishes.

data.name: Click the image, type the callout, then press Ctrl+Enter.
data.value: Click the image, type the callout, then press Ctrl+Enter.

data.name: Click the image to add the next numbered marker.
data.value: Click the image to add the next numbered marker.

data.name: Drag the eraser over only the pixels you want to remove.
data.value: Drag the eraser over only the pixels you want to remove.

data.name: Drag to paint blur directly where the brush passes.
data.value: Drag to paint blur directly where the brush passes.

data.name: Drag on the image to add {0}.
data.value: Drag on the image to add {0}.

data.name:
The interface language has changed. Restart SnapPin now to apply it throughout the app?
Choose Later to apply it the next time SnapPin starts.
data.value:
The interface language has changed. Restart SnapPin now to apply it throughout the app?
Choose Later to apply it the next time SnapPin starts.

data.name: SnapPin could not determine its executable path.
data.value: SnapPin could not determine its executable path.

data.name: Administrator launch was cancelled. SnapPin will continue with normal permissions for this session.
data.value: Administrator launch was cancelled. SnapPin will continue with normal permissions for this session.

data.name: SnapPin could not restart as administrator: {0}
data.value: SnapPin could not restart as administrator: {0}

data.name:
SnapPin recovered after the previous unexpected close. Open pins were restored from the last verified backup.
You can review the local diagnostic log in Preferences > About.
data.value:
SnapPin recovered after the previous unexpected close. Open pins were restored from the last verified backup.
You can review the local diagnostic log in Preferences > About.

data.name:
The recording was not added to history, but Windows kept the temporary file open:
{0}
data.value:
The recording was not added to history, but Windows kept the temporary file open:
{0}

data.name: The GitHub update package must use HTTPS.
data.value: The GitHub update package must use HTTPS.

data.name: The downloaded GitHub package failed its SHA-256 integrity check.
data.value: The downloaded GitHub package failed its SHA-256 integrity check.

data.name: A portable update cannot replace files in a drive root.
data.value: A portable update cannot replace files in a drive root.

data.name: The portable GitHub package did not contain SnapPin.exe.
data.value: The portable GitHub package did not contain SnapPin.exe.

data.name: Windows could not start the portable update helper.
data.value: Windows could not start the portable update helper.

data.name: The portable update contained an unsafe path.
data.value: The portable update contained an unsafe path.

data.name: The image could not be prepared for WebP export.
data.value: The image could not be prepared for WebP export.

data.name: Windows could not trim this recording ({0}).
data.value: Windows could not trim this recording ({0}).

data.name: Checking the package integrity before any files are changed.
data.value: Checking the package integrity before any files are changed.

data.name: Do not close this window while the portable files are being replaced.
data.value: Do not close this window while the portable files are being replaced.

data.name: Extracting and validating the update in a temporary folder.
data.value: Extracting and validating the update in a temporary folder.

data.name: SnapPin {0} is available. Click to review and download it.
data.value: SnapPin {0} is available. Click to review and download it.

data.name: SnapPin {0} is downloaded and ready. Click to choose when to restart.
data.value: SnapPin {0} is downloaded and ready. Click to choose when to restart.

data.name:
SnapPin could not apply update {0}. The previous version was restored.
{1}
data.value:
SnapPin could not apply update {0}. The previous version was restored.
{1}

data.name: The downloaded SnapPin version ({0}) did not match the expected version ({1}).
data.value: The downloaded SnapPin version ({0}) did not match the expected version ({1}).

data.name: The installer is downloaded and verified. Install it now, or choose Later to keep using this version.
data.value: The installer is downloaded and verified. Install it now, or choose Later to keep using this version.

data.name: The portable SnapPin folder is not writable.
data.value: The portable SnapPin folder is not writable.

data.name: The portable update needs at least {0} of free space.
data.value: The portable update needs at least {0} of free space.

data.name: The portable update request is incomplete.
data.value: The portable update request is incomplete.

data.name: The portable update request is invalid: {0}
data.value: The portable update request is invalid: {0}

data.name: The portable update request is not safe to apply.
data.value: The portable update request is not safe to apply.

data.name: The prepared portable update is no longer available. Download it again.
data.value: The prepared portable update is no longer available. Download it again.

data.name: The previous version was restored. Reopening SnapPin...
data.value: The previous version was restored. Reopening SnapPin...

data.name: The staged SnapPin executable is missing.
data.value: The staged SnapPin executable is missing.

data.name: The update helper is not running from the verified staging folder.
data.value: The update helper is not running from the verified staging folder.

data.name: The update is downloaded, verified, and prepared. Restart SnapPin now to replace the portable files, or choose Later to keep using this version.
data.value: The update is downloaded, verified, and prepared. Restart SnapPin now to replace the portable files, or choose Later to keep using this version.

data.name: Update failed. Restoring the previous version...
data.value: Update failed. Restoring the previous version...

data.name: Administrator approval was cancelled. The previous version will reopen.
data.value: Administrator approval was cancelled. The previous version will reopen.

data.name: Administrator permission is required. Waiting for approval...
data.value: Administrator permission is required. Waiting for approval...

data.name: SnapPin will retry the portable update with administrator permission.
data.value: SnapPin will retry the portable update with administrator permission.

data.name: SnapPin could not restart the portable updater as administrator: {0}
data.value: SnapPin could not restart the portable updater as administrator: {0}
